visual_base.visual_narrative_log: (1) A man with styled brown hair and a cream-colored short-sleeved shirt makes exaggerated, surprised facial expressions. A hand from off-screen slides three different colored gift boxes—red, yellow, and green—one by one in front of his face against a plain white background. (2) The scene transitions to a bright indoor living area with cartoon portraits on the wall. The man in the cream shirt enters from the left carrying a red gift box. Two other people, a man in a grey shirt and a woman in a black shirt, are sitting at a wooden table cooking meat on a portable electric BBQ grill. (3) Close-up shots of the three individuals depict a lively conversation. The man in cream points at the red box and then toward the others, who are holding skewers. Yellow text overlays appear indicating names and locations for the man and woman at the table. (4) Detailed product shots show several 'Nong Chun Xiang' chicken essence boxes arranged on a wooden table. A clear, double-walled glass cup containing a golden liquid sits in the foreground. (5) The man in the cream shirt holds the red box up to the camera, gesturing with his hands as he speaks directly to the viewer. The background features indoor plants and wall art, with bright, even lighting throughout the space. (6) A sequence of shots shows the golden liquid chicken essence being poured from a silver packet into the glass cup. The woman and the other man are shown taking sips from the glass, nodding with approval and giving thumbs-up gestures to the camera. (7) Multiple varieties of the product boxes (Original, Red Date, Black Garlic) are showcased in a montage. The man in cream, now joined by the other two, holds up different boxes. Large red and yellow text overlays dominate the screen, highlighting a '79% off' promotional offer.
visual_base.text_narrative_log: (1) [Subtitle]: 欸欸欸欸. (2) [Subtitle]: 準備中秋禮盒給你家人準備了沒有. (3) [Subtitle]: 真的有?! (4) [Logo]: 新北_王小姐. (5) [Subtitle]: 我媽說他們不用準備. (6) [Logo]: 台北_周先生. (7) [Subtitle]: 家人都不喜歡吃甜的. (8) [Subtitle]: 阿帶月餅禮盒回去又沒人吃. (9) [Subtitle]: 不是你以為現在中秋節只能送什麼月餅啦柚子喔. (10) [Subtitle]: 來啦推薦你們啦. (11) [Slogan]: 農純鄉中秋禮盒. (12) [Subtitle]: 給你送健康. (13) [Subtitle]: 大家都很熟了. (14) [Subtitle]: 他們家的滴雞精真的只有雞喔!! (15) [Slogan]: 天然無添加 市面上鈉含量最低. (16) [Subtitle]: 好喝無腥味一份心意啦. (17) [Subtitle]: 不管是老人小孩孕婦一家大小通通都能喝. (18) [Subtitle]: 除了中秋禮盒之外還有很多口味喔. (19) [Variety]: 原味. (20) [Variety]: 紅棗枸杞. (21) [Variety]: 黑蒜蛤蜊. (22) [Subtitle]: 通通都是孝親首選. (23) [Subtitle]: 健康實在讓你的長輩們元氣滿滿. (24) [Subtitle]: 重點是現在農純鄉中秋禮盒任選兩件79折. (25) [Subtitle]: 還不趕快去下單. (26) [Subtitle]: 有沒有買? (27) [Subtitle]: 有啦我有買給我爸媽啦. (28) [Subtitle]: 你爸媽不夠啦. (29) [Subtitle]: 岳父岳母要不要送. (30) [Variety]: (周先生語塞). (31) [Subtitle]: 有沒有買? (32) [Subtitle]: 有買我要送給畢書盡. (33) [Subtitle]: 畢媽跟畢爸. (34) [Subtitle]: 畢書盡關你屁事啊. (35) [Subtitle]: 畢書盡我們自己會送. (36) [Subtitle]: 好我幫你屬名啦. (37) [Subtitle]: 蔡阿嘎寄的OK啦. (38) [Subtitle]: 趕快趕快禮多人不怪啊. (39) [Subtitle]: 爸媽說不要就是要送啦. (40) [Slogan]: 趕快到農純鄉官網下單.

visual_human_presence.countingEvidence: 1 main male host (Tsai A-ga), 1 male guest, and 1 female guest present at the table.
visual_human_presence.mainCharacterDescription: The main host is a man with short brown hair, wearing a cream-colored short-sleeved shirt and light-colored shorts. He has a very expressive face and energetic gestures.

visual_scene_and_style.backgroundDescribe: An indoor living or dining space with a wooden dining table, a portable grill, several indoor plants, and personalized cartoon character portraits hanging on the wall.

audio_base.audio_narrative_log: (1) High-tempo, upbeat acoustic guitar BGM starts immediately. A male voice makes sharp, high-pitched 'Whoa!' sounds accompanied by digital whoosh SFX that sync with visual transitions. (2) Main male speaker begins talking rapidly with a high-arousal, comedic tone. He asks about holiday plans, while faint laughter and low-level ambient room tone of three people talking are audible. (3) A distinct 'sizzling' sound effect is heard as the group grills food, mixed with a percussive 'ding' sound to highlight a specific product feature mentioned in the narration. (4) Vocal delivery stays clear and fast-paced, with the narrator using rising intonations for questions. Short, melodic cartoon sound effects (like a slide whistle) appear during jokes. (5) Clear liquid pouring and splashing sound effects are prominent during the product demonstration. The BGM increases slightly in intensity and volume during the final promotional announcement. (6) The audio concludes with a high-energy call to action, where the speaker's voice is highly projected, followed by a final comedic sound stinger as the track cuts.

narrative_and_purpose.narrativeStructure: List-based: Hook -> Problem/Context -> Solution/Product Intro -> Features/Benefits -> Offer/CTA -> Comedy Outro
narrative_and_purpose.mainPurpose: To promote 'Nong Chun Xiang' chicken essence gift boxes for the Mid-Autumn Festival by addressing the common dilemma of what to gift elder relatives who don't like sweets. The video uses humor and a high-energy vlog style to appeal to a young adult audience.

endorsement_analysis.endorsementCues: The video is a dedicated commercial for the brand, featuring product demonstrations, variety descriptions, and a specific promotional discount code or offer.

high_inference.freeDescribe: This is a high-quality social media advertisement featuring a well-known Taiwanese influencer (Tsai A-ga). The fast editing and comedic timing are typical of modern YouTube/Shorts promotion content.
